description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and upload to PyPI that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: build_wheels to build wheels on ubuntu-18.04, build_sdist to build a source distribution on ubuntu-latest, and upload_pypi to upload artifacts to PyPI when a tag starting with v is pushed. The upload_pypi job depends on the successful completion of build_wheels and build_sdist.
